properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One day I ran my boat aground, My ship of love was goin' down; Then Jesus came at my distress, Don't call me lucky, call me blessed.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don't call me lucky, call me blessed This life of mine's no chance success; I know Jesus is my happiness Don't call me lucky, call me blessed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've ears to hear and eyes to see I've got a precious family; A place to lay my head and rest Don't call me lucky, call me blessed.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Blessed are the meek and lowly, While on this earth they trod; Blessed are the poor in spirit For we know that they'll see God. Blessed are those who hunger, And thirst for righteousness; Don't call them lucky, call them blessed.
